mocks.usage: Provides fallback data when the bridge is not connected or returns an error. Also used in SwiftUI previews.

mocks.mockedData: Simulates all bridge protocol methods with hardcoded results from MGFixtures.
mocks.usage: Scaffolded fallback client; not initialized in production unless explicitly passed.

mocks.mockedData: Invokes connectMockComputer() to populate MGAppModel state with static data.
mocks.usage: Used for Xcode canvas previews of Spaces, Chats, and New Task screens.
